title: claytonia volubilis
intro: Claytonia volubilis, also known as the "Vine-leafed Miner's Lettuce," is a perennial flowering plant in the Portulacaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial in treating various health conditions. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, and its leaves have been used as a treatment for fever and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, Claytonia volubilis is typically used in teas, infusions, or as a dried herb, and its leaves can also be eaten raw in salads for their nutritional benefits.
